# SSH 原子上传（先传临时文件再重命名）
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 原子上传，避免部署时读到半写文件
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "upload_atomic", "local_path": "/local/app.bin", "remote_path": "/opt/app/app.bin", "temp_path": "/opt/app/app.bin.tmp"}
aitk SSH_

# 省略temp_path时自动用 remote_path.tmp
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "upload_atomic", "local_path": "/local/app.bin", "remote_path": "/opt/app/app.bin"}
aitk SSH_
